name: code-simplifier
description: Simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality.

interface.shortDescription: Simplify recently modified code without changing behavior.
interface.longDescription: Code Simplifier ports Anthropic's Claude Code code-simplifier agent into a Codex skill. It focuses on recently modified or explicitly selected code, reduces accidental complexity, follows project standards, and preserves existing behavior.
defaultPrompt: Refine this code without changing behavior.
Clean up the touched code for maintainability.
